description: Update `packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/src/enhancer/DocumentPathsMappingEnhancer.ts` so the semantic MetaEd `schoolYearEnumeration` property type maps to ApiSchema `PathType` `number` when document reference path metadata is built.
acceptance-criteria: Existing mappings for boolean, numeric, date, date-time, string, and time property types remain unchanged.
The implementation uses the MetaEd property type value directly and does not infer school year semantics from JSON path strings, resource names, or other naming conventions.
The change is limited to the MetaEd ApiSchema package and does not update downstream DMS fixture files.
steps-to-verify: Review `packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/src/enhancer/DocumentPathsMappingEnhancer.ts` and confirm `schoolYearEnumeration` is handled in the `getPathType` switch.
Run `npx jest packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/enhancer/DocumentPathsMappingEnhancer.test.ts` from the repository root.

description: Update the focused `DocumentPathsMappingEnhancer` unit coverage so school year reference JSON path entries expect numeric path typing.
acceptance-criteria: At least one direct `SchoolYear` reference snapshot or assertion expects `referenceJsonPaths[*].type` to be `number` for `$.schoolYearTypeReference.schoolYear`.
Existing role-named, collection, nested, or merge-related school year reference path coverage is updated where the corrected mapping changes expected output.
Non-school-year path type expectations in `DocumentPathsMappingEnhancer.test.ts` remain unchanged except for unavoidable snapshot context around the school year entries.
The unit test fails against the old mapping and passes after `schoolYearEnumeration` maps to `number`.
steps-to-verify: Run `npx jest packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/enhancer/DocumentPathsMappingEnhancer.test.ts` from the repository root.

Review the snapshot diff for `packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/enhancer/DocumentPathsMappingEnhancer.test.ts` and confirm changed `type` values are school year reference paths changing from `string` to `number`.

description: Regenerate and update the MetaEd ApiSchema authoritative artifacts affected by the corrected generator output across the package's supported authoritative compare coverage.
acceptance-criteria: Authoritative artifacts under `packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/integration/artifact/v7_1`, `v7_2`, and `v7_3` are refreshed from generated output after the mapping fix.

Coverage includes Data Standard 5.0 for ODS/API 7.1, Data Standard 5.1 and TPDM for ODS/API 7.2, and the v7.3 Data Standard 5.2, 6.0, 6.1, TPDM, Sample, and Homograph scenarios exercised by `ApiSchemaAuthoritativeCompare_v7_3.test.ts`.
Regenerated diffs show school year `referenceJsonPaths[*].type` values changing to `number` where applicable.
No DMS ApiSchema fixture files are changed as part of this MetaEd-side task.
steps-to-verify: Run `cd packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema && npm run update-authoritative` to regenerate compare artifacts and copy generated output to authoritative files.
Run `git diff -- packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/integration/artifact` and inspect that the artifact changes are limited to the expected school year reference path type updates.

description: Validate that the corrected MetaEd ApiSchema output is internally consistent for school year reference paths and that the branch remains scoped to MetaEd artifacts.
acceptance-criteria: `studentAcademicRecordReference.schoolYear` no longer appears in generated or authoritative ApiSchema output as a `referenceJsonPaths[*].type` of `string` while the same path is included in `numericJsonPaths`.
School year reference path type metadata is consistent with existing JSON schema, type coercion, and OpenAPI school year handling.
Authoritative compare tests pass for all ApiSchema compare suites after artifact refresh.
The final file diff excludes downstream DMS fixture updates; those remain a downstream PR or handoff using corrected MetaEd output.
steps-to-verify: Run `npx jest packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/integration/ApiSchemaAuthoritativeCompare_v7_1.test.ts` from the repository root.
Run `npx jest packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/integration/ApiSchemaAuthoritativeCompare_v7_2.test.ts` from the repository root.
Run `npx jest packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/integration/ApiSchemaAuthoritativeCompare_v7_3.test.ts` from the repository root.

Inspect representative generated or authoritative artifacts, including `packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema/test/integration/artifact/v7_3/ds-5.2-api-schema-authoritative.json`, for school year reference entries now typed as `number`.

description: Run package-level TypeScript and ESLint checks for the MetaEd ApiSchema package after the implementation, tests, and artifacts are updated.
acceptance-criteria: `npx tsc -p packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema --noEmit` passes from the repository root.
`npx eslint --max-warnings 0 --ext .js,.ts packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema` passes from the repository root.
No `npm run build` command is run.
steps-to-verify: Run `npx tsc -p packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema --noEmit` from the repository root.
Run `npx eslint --max-warnings 0 --ext .js,.ts packages/metaed-plugin-edfi-api-schema` from the repository root.
